name: tpl-pharma-regulatory-submission
description: Pharma RA Specialist (藥廠法規事務專員) — poll regulatory portal for authority queries, AI classify query type and draft response, route to medical director or RA reviewer, delay for SME review, receive finalized response, submit to regulatory portal, confirm submission. Replace portal externalUrl with your regulatory authority endpoint (e.g. FDA ESG, EMA CESP, PMDA eCTD gateway).

steps.notifyMsg: Regulatory query routed to Medical Director for review. Submission: {{submission_id}} ({{product_name}}), Authority: {{authority_code}}. Query type: CLINICAL/SAFETY. Deadline: {{response_deadline}}. Query summary: {{steps.classify-and-draft.output.query_summary}}. Confidence: {{steps.classify-and-draft.output.confidence_level}}. Draft response prepared — please review, amend, and confirm via the portal callback within 3 days.

Regulatory query routed to RA team for review. Submission: {{submission_id}} ({{product_name}}), Authority: {{authority_code}}. Query type: {{steps.classify-and-draft.output.query_type}}. Deadline: {{response_deadline}}. Query summary: {{steps.classify-and-draft.output.query_summary}}. Confidence: {{steps.classify-and-draft.output.confidence_level}}. Draft response prepared — please review and confirm via the portal callback within 3 days.

Regulatory response submitted to {{authority_code}} for {{product_name}} ({{submission_id}}). Query type: {{steps.classify-and-draft.output.query_type}}. Submission status: {{steps.submit-to-portal.output.submission_status}}. Portal reference: {{steps.submit-to-portal.output.submission_reference}}. Deadline was: {{response_deadline}}. Submitted at: {{steps.submit-to-portal.output.submitted_at}}. RA file updated and regulatory timeline tracker notified.
